prompt: Create an ultra-realistic cinematic lifestyle portrait using the uploaded woman's facial identity and hairstyle as the reference. Preserve her facial features, eye shape, eyebrows, lips, skin tone, and naturally voluminous dark brown wavy-curly hair while changing only the pose, outfit styling, and environment composition. The woman is seated elegantly on a plush cream-colored sofa in a luxurious modern living room during golden hour. She leans slightly forward with her body angled toward the camera. Her left elbow rests casually on the sofa armrest while her left hand supports her chin in a relaxed, thoughtful pose. Her right arm rests naturally across her lap. She looks directly into the camera with a soft, confident, calm expression. She wears a fitted white ribbed tank top with a moderately raised scoop neckline that sits approximately 1 inch higher than a standard low-cut tank top, creating a feminine yet modest appearance. Over it, she wears an oversized blush-pink satin button-up shirt left open and draped loosely off the shoulders. Delicate layered gold necklaces, small gold hoop earrings, and a slim gold bracelet complete the look. Warm late-afternoon sunlight streams through floor-to-ceiling windows, creating soft golden highlights across her face, shoulders, and hair. The curls catch subtle amber reflections, emphasizing texture and volume. Natural shadows add depth and realism. The background features a luxury minimalist interior with beige stone walls, light wood architectural accents, sheer white curtains, a marble coffee table, and a vase of fresh white lilies. The background is softly blurred with creamy bokeh, keeping attention on the subject. Captured on a full-frame mirrorless camera with an 85mm portrait lens at f/1.8. Razor-sharp eyes, realistic skin texture with visible pores, detailed hair strands, subtle natural makeup, glossy lips, shallow depth of field, HDR lighting, warm neutral color grading, premium editorial fashion photography, luxury home atmosphere, photorealistic, ultra-detailed, cinematic composition, DSLR quality, 8K resolution, magazine-cover quality.

promptZh: 使用上传女性的面部身份和发型作为参考，创作一张超写实的电影感生活方式肖像。在仅改变姿势、服装造型和环境构图的同时，保留她的面部特征、眼型、眉毛、嘴唇、肤色以及自然蓬松的深棕色波浪卷发。画面中，这位女性优雅地坐在 毛绒奶油色沙发 上，身处黄金时刻的奢华现代客厅中。她身体微微前倾，朝向镜头。左肘随意地靠在沙发扶手上，左手托着下巴，姿态放松而沉思。右臂自然地放在膝盖上。她直视镜头，表情柔和、自信且平静。她身穿一件 修身白色罗纹背心，领口比标准低胸背心高出约 1 英寸，呈现出既女性化又不失端庄的外观。外搭一件 超大款腮红粉色缎面衬衫，敞开并松散地披在肩上。精致的叠戴金项链、小巧的金质圆圈耳环和纤细的金手链完善了整体造型。温暖的午后阳光透过落地窗倾泻而入，在她的脸庞、肩膀和头发上投下柔和的金色高光。卷发捕捉到细微的琥珀色反光，突显了质感与蓬松度。自然的阴影增加了深度和真实感。背景呈现出奢华简约的室内装饰，包括米色石墙、浅色木质建筑装饰、透明白纱帘、大理石咖啡桌以及一瓶新鲜的白百合。背景经过柔和的虚化处理，呈现出奶油般的焦外成像效果，使视觉焦点始终集中在主体上。使用全画幅无反相机搭配 85mm 人像镜头，光圈 f/1.8 拍摄。锐利的双眼、可见毛孔的真实皮肤质感、细腻的发丝、精致的自然妆容、光泽感的双唇、浅景深、HDR 灯光、温暖的中性色调、高级编辑时尚摄影、奢华家居氛围、照片级真实感、超高细节、电影级构图、单反画质、8K 分辨率、杂志封面级质量。
